prompt: The record does not compile. What is the bug?
choices: Records can extend any non-final class
Records implicitly extend java.lang.Record and cannot extend any other class; extending Base is a compile error
Records can only extend abstract classes
extends is replaced by implements for records
explanation: All records implicitly extend java.lang.Record (similar to how enums extend java.lang.Enum). Because Java has single inheritance, a record cannot additionally extend any other class. Records can implement interfaces. Fix: remove extends Base, and use an interface if shared behaviour is needed.
